package rulecoverage

func NegativeFilepathJoinWithUserPath() string {
    ruleID := "filepath_join_with_user_path"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`filepath.Join(baseDir, userInput)` without subsequent `filepath.Rel` or path-containment validation"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
